name: Cranberry Nut Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Orange juice concentrate, thawed and undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine Miracle Whip, orange juice, eggs and berries in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine flour, sugar, chopped nuts, grated orange rind, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. Stir the wet mixture into the dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Fill greased muffin cups about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Let stand 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
